events.description: A high volume of failed login attempts (50) from a single IP address indicates a potential brute-force or credential stuffing attack targeting the system.
events.action: Block the source IP address 192.168.1.100, inspect the targeted accounts for successful logins, and enforce multi-factor authentication.

events.description: An internal host (10.0.0.55) performed an anomalously large data transfer of 15.5 GB, indicating potential unauthorized data extraction or lateral movement.
events.action: Isolate the host at 10.0.0.55, terminate active sessions associated with the IP, and audit access logs to identify the compromised data.

events.description: An internal host (172.16.0.200) performed a rapid scan of 1000 ports, suggesting active network discovery and potential lateral movement preparation by a compromised asset.
events.action: Isolate the host at 172.16.0.200 immediately, terminate active connections, and perform a forensic investigation on the source device.
